displayTitle: Weld Flaws Are Born With an Address

beats.narration: Every weld flaw is born from a specific physical event — and that birth fixes where it lives and which way it faces.

payload.title: THE USUAL SUSPECTS
payload.sub: Every flaw's origin fixes its address and orientation.

beats.narration: Hot cracks tear the freezing centerline. Cold cracks need hydrogen, hardness, and stress — striking hours or days later. Lamellar tears delaminate the plate itself.
Lack of fusion hugs the bevel it never melted — about thirty degrees off vertical. Incomplete penetration leaves a vertical slot at the root centerline.

payload.heading: Fusion flaws copy the fusion faces
payload.note: LOF FOLLOWS THE BEVEL · IP STANDS VERTICAL

beats.narration: Slag lodges along sidewalls and between passes. Porosity is trapped gas — smooth, round pores scatter sound rather than mirror it.
So here's the rule: know the birth story, and you know the address and the orientation. Orientation is everything to an angle beam.

payload.sub: That map is your scan plan.
